articleContent:
Dear Rovers,
Thank you for your continued support. The following is a summary of content that will become available in Version 3.4: The Dream Not Dreamed.
 
[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]
✦Maintenance Time: 2026-06-08 04:00 - 2026-06-08 11:00 (UTC+8)
✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2
✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-06-08 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.
※In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.
 
✦Bug Fixes Compensation Astrite x300
✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-06-08 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.
 
[Event Conclusion Time Reminder]
The following currently available events are scheduled to end at the conclusion of Version 3.4. Please pay attention to the event duration and participate in time.
✦[Into the Memory Program!] Anniversary in Numbers ends at: 2026-07-09 03:59 (UTC+8)
✦First Endstate Matrix Cycle (Doomsday Cycle) ends at: 2026-07-10 03:59 (UTC+8)
 
[Version Update Details]
✦Collab Resonators✦
5-Star Resonator: Lucy (Spectro/Pistols)
An Edgerunner from the Night City. The Netrunner of her crew.
With a heavy debt in her heart, she deliberately keeps a distance from people. Even those who are closest to her know little of her past.
●Combat Roles: Main Damage Dealer, Heavy Attack DMG, Basic Attack DMG Amplification, Hack Response
※Obtainable through the [Dreaming Upon the Moon] Collab Resonator Convene.
 
5-Star Resonator: Rebecca (Electro/Pistols)
An Edgerunner like Lucy, though completely different in her M.O.
A whimsical fireball who's always ready to raze out your troubles with her shotgun.
●Combat Roles: Concerto Efficiency, Basic Attack DMG, Heavy Attack DMG Amplification, Tune Break Boost, Hack Response
※Obtainable through the [Rekindled Embers of Rage] Collab Resonator Convene.
 
✦New Resonator✦
5-Star Resonator: Lucilla (Glacio/Rectifier)
Lucilla, President of Startorch Academy and idealist with both feet on the ground. She holds quiet vigil over her students as they rise to challenge the very sky.
●Combat Roles: Concerto Efficiency, Basic Attack DMG, Echo Skill DMG, Glacio Chafe, Echo Skill DMG Amplification
※Obtainable through the [Tomorrow in the Frame] Featured Resonator Convene.
 
✦Collab Weapons✦
5-Star Weapon: Spectral Trigger (Pistols)
A neon glow gilds this cage of memory, same as always. I wander along old city streets, spilling unspoken words to shadows long gone.
I wanna stay lost here, but the dream is fraying. I must wake up.
※Obtainable through the [Spectral Trigger] Collab Weapon Convene.
 
5-Star Weapon: Skull Thrasher (Pistols)
Because death is a reality that cannot be undone, there's no reason to hesitate.
She pulls the trigger, shattering this haunting reverie.
※Obtainable through the [Skull Thrasher] Collab Weapon Convene.
 
✦New Weapon✦
5-Star Weapon: Freeze Frame (Rectifier)
I remember the sunset spilling down, birds and insects threading their small songs through the greenhouse.
I remember the quiet nights, my lone steps echoing the crescent moon's curve.
I am my own freeze frame. I am my own afterimage.
※Obtainable through the [Freeze Frame] Featured Weapon Convene.
 
✦Collab Area✦
Somnoire: Night City
A phantom city manifested from Lucy's mind and the dreamscape of Lahai-Roi. A place born from her memory, where those with great ambitions sought freedom within a cage of neon light. There, passion burned as readily as hatred, and starlight could scarcely pierce its gloom. For those dark streets below, only the moon shone through.
※Reach the area during Episodic Quest - Chapter III Side Story "At Dream's Edge."
 
✦Collab Echo✦
Reminiscence - Nightmare: Adam Smasher
 
●New Sonata Effect: Shadow of Shattered Dreams (1-piece Set)
Shadow of Shattered Dreams (1-piece Set): Inflicting Hack - Shifting on the target grants 35% Basic Attack DMG Bonus and Heavy Attack DMG Bonus for 15s.
 
✦Collab Enemies✦
Nightmare: Armed Corpo, Nightmare: Security Corpo, Nightmare: Special Response Corpo
 
✦Collab Story✦
[Episodic Quest] Chapter III Side Story: At Dream's Edge
Following a sudden shift in the Somnoire, a Gateway emerges within the Academy. From it, ominous frequencies spill forth. You venture into the depths and chance upon Lucy and Rebecca, visitors from another world. On the edge of reality and dream, you fight back Nightmare Tacet Discords and search for a solution to the crisis. At the end of your quest, a familiar figure awaits.
 
✦Duration: Permanently available after Version 3.4 update
✦Eligibility: Complete Main Quest Chapter III Segue "Beneath a Melting Night Sky" to unlock.
※During Version 3.4, reach the transport dock during Main Quest Chapter III Act I "What Burns Beneath Frostlands" to unlock the "Next Stop: 'Night City'" Event, through which you can gain early access to the Episodic Quest - Chapter III Side Story "At Dream's Edge." Once unlocked early, the Episodic Quest becomes available alongside Main Quest Chapters I, II, and III. Players may experience the Episodic Quest and the Main Quest in parallel. All progress and unlock status of the current quests will not be affected.
※For the best experience, complete the Main Quest Chapter III Segue "Beneath a Melting Night Sky"" before starting the Episodic Quest "At Dream's Edge."
 
✦New Story✦
[Main Quest] Chapter III Segue: We Choose the Sky
Though the Threnodian Aleph-1 was banished, Lucilla finds herself in yet another predicament. In the absence of the Exostrider, funders are questioning whether the Synchronist program—and even the Rabelle College itself—should continue to exist. As both a professor and the head of the Academy, Lucilla must now choose between harsh reality and her ideals.
 
✦Duration: Permanently available after 2026-06-13 10:00 (server time)
✦Eligibility: Complete Main Quest Chapter III Segue "Beneath a Melting Night Sky" to unlock.
 
✦New Events & Gameplay Features✦
[Collab Events]:
[Night City Roaming] Featured Collab Event
This is a place where dreams overlap with reality, where violence and conflict keep fortunes flowing. Here, everything is up for grabs, provided you can pay the price. Welcome to Night City.
✦Duration: Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)
 
[Instant Flashlight] Collab Special Login Event
During the collab version, you may claim 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free via this event.
✦Duration: Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)
[Login Rewards]: 5 Star Resonator Rebecca x1
 
[Gifts of Dreamchasers] 10-Day Special Login Event
This event's login rewards are split into regular login rewards and cumulative login rewards.
✦Duration: Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 03:59 (server time)
[Regular Login Rewards]: Dreamcatcher Tide x10
[Cumulative Login Rewards]: Dreamcatcher Tide x5, Dream's Edge x1 (Collab Avatar)
 
[Matrix Reform] Collab Puzzle Event
As frequencies spill forth from the Somnoire, Lucy seeks your assistance in breaching the dreamscape to contain the problem.
✦Duration: 2026-06-25 04:00 - 2026-7-9 03:59 (server time)
 
[Sweetdream Tuning]
The "Sweetdream Tuning" event will be simultaneously available alongside Collab Resonator/Weapon Convene of the "At Dream's Edge" collab campaign. When the number of Convene attempts reaches specific milestones, corresponding rewards will become available.
✦Duration: Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)
✦Rewards: At Dream's Edge - Waveband x2, Dreamcatcher Tide x30
 
[Special Events]
[Depths of Illusive Realm: Dreamchasers]
The Somnoire gateway suddenly appears in Lahai-Roi, and deep within the Dream Abode, a crisis brews...
✦Duration: Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 03:59 (server time)
 
[Startorch Racing, Rerun!] Leisure Event
Startorch Racing is back! This time, it's not just a race against the clock. You're going head-to-head against other players. Hop on your expedition motorbike and throttle toward the finish line!
✦Duration: 2026-06-11 04:00 - 2026-06-25 03:59 (server time)
 
[Dream of Azure Sky] Limited-Time Login Event
During the event, log in to claim the day's login rewards from the event page.
✦Duration: 2026-06-18 10:00 - 2026-07-09 03:59 (server time)
 
✦New Mech✦
●Accessories: Lynae - Unbound Brilliance, Mornye - Corner of the Star Sea
 
✦[Other Collab Content✦
●[Nightmare Challenge]: Nightmare: Adam Smasher
●[Collab Track]: I Really Want to Stay At Your House
●[Collab Sigil]: Where Did Your Love Go?
●[Collab Title]: Legend Smasher
●[Collab WavesLine Looks]: David Martinez (WavesLine Chat Bubble) x1, "I miss you all the time" (WavesLine Chat Background) x1
 
✦Other New Content✦
●[Tactical Hologram: Synchronization Challenge]: Nameless Explorer
●[New Phantom Echo]: Phantom: Glommoth
●[Motorbike Liveries]: Finish Line, Silent Array
●[Accessory]: Mornye Cube
 
[Adjustments and Optimizations]
✦Features✦
●Expedition Motorbike:
Added support for motorbike appearance presets
- Added the "Custom Preset" section to the Import Preset page.
- You can have up to 15 Preset Plans, each consisting of a Chassis Mod, a Livery, and an Accessory.
- Select a Preset Plan and press the "Import Preset" button to remove the current appearance and import the preset.
 
●Camera Mode:
Added the "Image Quality" feature
- This feature is available on devices with 4 RAM or above. Higher settings will allow you to capture higher-quality images.
- The Image Quality options are as follows:
①Default (1x): When you take and save an image, the image will be at the current screen resolution.
②High (2x): When you take and save an image, the image will be at twice the current screen resolution. (※Maximum resolution is 8K.)
- Please note: if your device does not meet the requirements, the "Image Quality" feature will not be displayed.
 
Added "Adjust camera distance" and "Rotate"
- With the "Adjust camera distance" feature, you can adjust the distance between the camera and the character within a certain range.
- With the "Rotate" feature, you can rotate the angle of the camera between -45° and 45°. Disable the "Rotate" option and press the reset button to reset the camera angle to the default: 0°.
 
●Backpack:
Optimized the functionality of Backpack
- Added the "Use" button to certain items. Clicking on the button will take you to the location where this item can be used, such as Item Exchange, Wheel, Synthesis Recipe.
- Adjusted the user experience for various types of Chests. Upon using a chest, you no longer need to unselect the selected option when switching between different options.
- Adjusted the mechanics of how red dots are added to certain items in the Backpack. A red dot is added only when these items are obtained for the first time.
- Adjusted the display order of certain items in specific categories of the Backpack.
 
✦Leveling✦
●Resonator Ascension Planner:
Optimized the functionality of the Resonator Ascension Planner
- Added the "Focus Resonator" feature. You can set clear ascension goals for a specific Resonator, either in the Resonator Ascension Planner or in the Guidebook's material acquisition view. Once you set a goal, you can immediately see all the required materials in the Guidebook and jump straight to the locations where you can obtain them.
- If the needed materials can be topped up via Supply Packs, Synthesis, or other methods, the interface will display a "Replenishable" prompt.
- When Double Drop events like "Bountiful Crescendo" and "Chord Cleansing" are active, you'll also see that reflected in the interface.
- Added skill upgrade priority recommendations to the Resonator Ascension Planner's Skills screen and each Resonator's Forte screen, highlighting the highest and second-highest priority skills.
 
●Skills:
Optimized Skill Upgrade
- On each Resonator's Forte screen, with enough materials, use the slider on the skill upgrade page to choose your target level and complete a one-click upgrade all the way to max.
- If you're short on a specific material but it can be replenished, the system will automatically pull the material from Supply Packs, Synthesis, or Conversion.
 
✦Challenges, Puzzles, & Events✦
●Weekly Activity:
Added Weekly Activity
- Added the Weekly Activity tab to the Guidebook.
- Participate in the currently available Weekly Activity events "Phantasma Dreamland: Rhapsody" and "Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways" to win Weekly Activity Points. Upon reaching specific Activity Point milestones, you may claim the corresponding Weekly Rewards.
- Your accumulated Weekly Activity Points, as well as the Weekly Rewards for each milestone, are reset every Monday at 04:00. Any unclaimed Weekly Rewards at that time will be sent to you via in-game Mail. Please claim them promptly.
※We will continue to introduce more Weekly Activity events in future updates. Stay tuned!
 
Added Phantasma Dreamland: Rhapsody
- Eligibility: Reach Union Level 30. (Complete the Permanent Event "Phantasma Dreamland" first for a better experience).
- Access the event via Guidebook > Weekly Activity.
- The Stage Environment refreshes every Monday. Echoes can only be directed on certain days based on the Stage Environment of the week. Use them to collect Dreamland Coupons to reach the stage goals so that the park may continue to operate.
- Phantasma Dreamland: Rhapsody offers the new features of Strange Encounters and Relics. Different Strange Encounters and Relics provide various effects that give you a new taste of the event.
- Completing Dreamland Stage Goals grants Weekly Activity Points. Weekly Activity Points will no longer be granted once the weekly limit is reached. Accumulate Weekly Activity Points to unlock and claim Weekly Rewards. Weekly Rewards reset at 04:00 a.m. each Monday.
 
Adjusted "Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways"
- Put the "Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways" event under the Weekly Activity tab. You now claim your rewards from the Weekly Activity page for this event by accumulating Weekly Activity Points, instead of claiming them from the event page by obtaining Illusive Points.
- Removed the access points for this event from the corresponding event page, Guidebook - Recurring Challenges page, and the Map. You will be able to access it via the Guidebook - Weekly Activity page or Somnoire entrances in Rinascita.
- Removed the process of claiming the rewards from the Remnant Crystal. Adjustments to the rewards from this event are as follows:
①The selectable Echo obtained by interacting with the Remnant Crystal is now replaced with a certain number of Advanced Resonance Potions and Tuners, and the new rewards will become part of the Weekly Activity rewards.
②The rewards—Advanced Sealed Tube, Premium Sealed Tube, Tuner, Shell Credit—obtained from the Remnant Crystal by using the 2 free attempts will become part of the Weekly Activity rewards.
 
- Adjusted the completion conditions for Voidmatter Blocks in the "Roya Frostlands - Dimmr Plains - Dimmr Deep" area.
 
✦UI✦
●Title Screen
Added the "Settings" button
- Added the "Settings" button on the right side of the title screen.
- Press the "Settings" button to access and adjust the settings for Sounds, Graphics, and Language.
- The settings options accessed through this button are not complete. To access the complete options, please visit the in-game settings.
 
●Guidebook ＆ Recurring Event Screens
Adjusted the display and functionality of Guidebook ＆ Recurring Event Screens
- Overworld interaction is no longer needed when you try to access Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways, Tower of Adversity, Whimpering Wastes, Tactical Hologram: Synchronization via the Guidebook screen or Recurring Event screen. You will be taken to the selected event or challenge directly.
- The Tower of Adversity banner on the Recurring Event screen will not disappear the day after you claim all the rewards for the current phase.
※Due to these adjustments, Tactical Hologram: Synchronization on the Guidebook screen will unlock only after you complete the Tutorial Quest for the corresponding Tactical Hologram.
 
- Optimized the display of certain icons.
 
✦Graphics & Performance✦
●Ray Tracing
Optimized Ray Tracing performance on PC
- Incorporated Megalights technology in Ray Tracing to improve the lighting effects in certain environments. (※There isn't a separate "Megalights" option. It takes effect when Ray Tracing is enabled.)
- If your device is equipped with an Nvidia 40 Series or newer graphics card and supports Ray Tracing, you can enable it via Settings > Graphics > Ray Tracing.
- Enabling Ray Tracing may contribute significantly to the device load. Please choose the suitable setting based on the performance of your device.
 
- Added interactive effects on PC when Resonators attack vehicles in certain scenes.
- Optimized the visual performance of certain scenes in the "Roya Frostlands - Dimmr Plains" area.
- Optimized the fire VFX in certain scenes.
 
✦Audio✦
●Dodge Sound Effects:
●Added sound effects for consecutive Dodges
- In addition to the default sound that plays when a successful Dodge is made, two more sounds will be available in combat, triggered after a specific number of successful Dodge attempts are made within a certain time period.
- Trigger conditions:
①Default Sound: Dodge 1 time
②Intensity 1 Sound: Dodge 4 times
③Intensity 2 Sound: Dodge 8 times
- If no Dodge is made within a certain time period, the count will be reset.
 
●Heart Radio Channel:
Adjusted the categorization of certain tracks/albums
- The album "Waking of a World" becomes "Echoes of Melodies Vol. 1."
- The album "Thousand Island Aftertune" becomes "Echoes of Melodies Vol. 2."
- Some of the tracks added in Version 3.0, Version 3.1 and Version 3.2 are now under "Echoes of Melodies Vol. 3."
 
- Optimized some audio/stereo effects.
 
✦Other✦
●Official Guide Depot
Optimized Guide Depot
- Added the Favorites feature to the skill upgrade section, allowing you to save guides and access them anytime.
- Added the Sharing feature to the skill upgrade section, allowing you to share links and images.
- Added skill showcase and recommended combos to the skill upgrade section.
- Added a shortcut on the Resonator Ascension Planner to the Guide Depot, making it easy to jump to and view related guide content.
 
- Adjusted some WavesLine messages in the "Whispers Between Stars" event.
- Optimized the descriptions of certain in-game settings and functions.
 
[Bug Fixes]
●Resonators & Weapons
- Fixed an issue where the icon of Resonator Hiyuki's Heavy Attack - Bitterfrost: Foreclaimed Self in the Futures' Tithe state was not correct.
- Fixed an anomaly with the display resolution of Resonator Hiyuki's Convene animation on some mobile devices.
- Fixed an issue where Resonator Sigrika did not blink when making certain movements.
- Fixed an issue in the "Depths of Illusive Realm" event where some of Resonator Aemeath's skill animations might not end as expected.
- Corrected textual errors in Resonator Aemeath's Character Stories.
- Fixed an anomaly with the cooldown of Resonator Cartethyia's Resonance Liberation.
- Fixed an issue in the "Depths of Illusive Realm" event where Resonator Shorekeeper's character model might behave abnormally when casting Intro Skill - Discernment.
 
●Enemies & Echoes
- Fixed an issue where some enemies exited the combat state during Overworld combat.
 
●Features
- Fixed an issue where Android devices equipped with Dimensity 9400/9400+/9500s processors might experience stuttering, crashing, character model display issues with the Vulkan option enabled. This issue has been resolved. Access to the Vulkan option will be available again for these devices in Version 3.4. After the Version 3.4 update, you can go to the settings to enable it.
- Fixed an issue where the character model on the Resonators screen might behave abnormally.
- Fixed a display issue with the weapon held by the character on the Resonators screen.
- Fixed an issue where connecting with a controller might cause the game to go black or become unresponsive.
- Fixed an issue in controller mode where Luuk Herssen's Resonator Skill Tutorial could not be completed.
- Fixed an issue where Fast Travel might be interrupted after using the "Fast Travel" function or when Fast Travel was triggered during the story/challenge.
- Fixed an issue where Chat red dots could not be removed.
- Fixed an issue where the target area was not called up after selecting "New difficulty available in Depths of Illusive Realm" on the Map screen.
- Fixed an issue in controller mode where the Overview page could not be closed after opening it on the "Map - Fabricatorium of the Deep" screen.
- Fixed an issue where the Trophy "The Unseen World" was granted without completing the exploration of the "Rinascita - Septimont - Minos Sewers" area.
- Fixed an issue where certain player actions could cause the "Data Bank - Data Merge" screen to become unresponsive.
- Fixed an issue where the Accessory model might stay on screen after hiding the Resonator wearing the Accessory.
- Fixed a display issue with Accessories in the Backpack.
- Fixed an issue on mobile where the "Remove" button might appear when an unremovable item was selected.
- Fixed an issue where the "New" icon did not appear on the "Gallery - Enemies" banner after unlocking the enemy "Hecate."
- Fixed an issue where some UI was displayed in the original language after switching to a different language.
- Fixed an issue where an interaction light dot might appear when there were no collectables or interactive objects nearby.
 
●Challenges, Puzzles, & Events
- Fixed an issue in the "Endstate Matrix" event where multiple Lineups might be displayed on the "Popular Teams" panel.
- Fixed an issue in the "Whimpering Wastes" event where the Resonance Mode icon for some Resonators was missing from the Lineup page.
- Fixed an issue in the "Depths of Illusive Realm" event where some "Resonator Upgrade" icons were not correct.
- Fixed an issue in the "Restoration: Silent Crag" challenge where the Restoration challenge remained marked as uncompleted after all the Light Builder challenges for the area had been completed.
- Fixed an issue where Frame Generation, self-developed or provided by Dimensity processors, failed to work on mobile devices while using the expedition motorbike.
- Fixed an issue where certain player actions might cause the character model to behave abnormally while using the expedition motorbike.
- Fixed an issue where Motorbike - Flight Track 2 was disrupted before it ended.
 
●Quests
- Fixed an issue in the Main Quest "Beneath a Melting Night Sky" where an error message about insufficient storage space might appear while playing Lahai-Roi Blocks with Denia.
- Fixed an issue on mobile where certain scenes might be missing from the "Relive the Sea of Stars battle" sequence after completing the Main Quest "Starlights from Yesterdays."
- Fixed an issue in the Main Quest "Flowing Starlight in the Iris" where Chisa might walk in the wrong direction during the objective "Continue to stroll with Chisa."
- Fixed an issue in the Exploration Quest "A Perfect Day for Flying" where certain visual assets in the "Solight Dial" challenge area might fail to display properly on PC.
- Fixed an issue in the Exploration Quest "Broken Dimmr Heart" where the target location was not tracked while tracking the current objective.
- Fixed an issue where the Side Quest "Void Storm Reinforcement" could not be accepted.
- Correct textual errors in the dialogue of the Side Quest "Message Stranded in Shimmer."
- Fixed an issue where the Side Quest "Where Wisdom Lights the Way" was not displayed in Journey Log after its completion.
- Fixed an issue in Focus Mode where talking to Aemeath was not possible in the Aemeath segment of the Event Quest "Whispers Between Stars."
 
●Environment
- Fixed an issue where restarting the game after talking to Aemeath in the "Roya Frostlands - Frostlands Surface - Mount Gjallar - Ginnungamere" area might cause Aemeath to disappear from the scene.
- Fixed an anomaly with some NPC models in the Roya Frostlands area.
- Fixed an issue where certain visual assets in the "Roya Frostlands - Stagnant Run" area failed to perform normally.
- Fixed an issue where the lighting effects were missing in some parts of the "Roya Frostlands - Dimmr Plains" area.
- Fixed a clipping issue with the character model while climbing in the "Roya Frostlands - Lahai-Roi - Startorch Academy" area.
articleTitle: Patch Notes for Version 3.4: The Dream Not Dreamed
